The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	ta_IN	EPAவில் உள்ள பிரச்சனைகள் தனித்துவமானவை. ஆனால் சுற்றுச்சூழல் குற்றங்களை தனது சுற்றுச்சூழல் மற்றும் தேச வளப் பிரிவு அல்லது ENRD மூலம் கையாளும் நீதித்துறையில் உள்ளவையுடன் தொடர்பற்றவை என்று சொல்வதற்கில்லை. About 450 million years ago, plants took a giant leap out of the oceans onto the land to become the plants that we know and love today. But how did they survive? Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	lv_LV	Pirms aptuveni 450 miljardiem gadu augi izlīda no okeāniem uz sauszemes, lai kļūtu par tiem augiem, kurus šobrīd zinām un esam iemīļojuši. Bet kā tie izdzīvoja? Džona Innesa centra zinātnieki, iespējams, ir to noskaidrojuši. Sauszemes augi izdzīvo, saņemot ūdeni un barības vielas no augsnes. Viņi to paveic, izveidojot īpašas attiecības ar augsnē dzīvojošām sēnēm, dēvētām par mikorizām. Šīs mikorizu dzīslas iestiepjas dziļi augsnē un piegādā augiem barības vielas un ūdeni. What we find now from the latest Scottish Government statistics is that, in the last year alone, average rents have increased in all sized properties, ranging from the lowest rise of 11.7 per cent for one-bedroom to the highest figure of 14.3 per cent for two-bedroom homes. Every type of property (from one to four bedroom to a room in a property) has had a double digit increase in rents since the Cost of Living legislation was introduced in October 2022, exceeding the annual average increases in rents over the previous 12 years by a factor of at least three.	da_DK	Derfor blev Cost of Living (Tenant protection) (Scotland) Act 2022 introduceret for næsten 18 måneder siden med det formål at gøre det muligt at have et huslejeloft i en begrænset periode for at lette presset på leveomkostningerne. I de seneste statistikker fra den skotske regeringen har vi dog kunnet se, at alene inden for det seneste år er den gennemsnitlige husleje steget for alle boliger, uanset størrelsen. However, it is crucial to note that the request violates various sections of Nigeria's Financial Regulations 2009, which explicitly prohibit fraud and other forms of corruption in government business. Additionally, Chapter Seven, Section 713 of Nigeria's Financial Regulations 2009 explicitly states, "Personal money shall in no circumstances be paid into a government bank account, nor shall any public money be paid into a private account." It further stipulates, "Any officer who pays public money into a private account is deemed to have done so with fraudulent intention."	ml_IN	നൈജീരിയൻ സിവിൽ സർവീസിന്‍റെ ചട്ടക്കൂട് പ്രകാരം ഈ നടപടി നിയമപരമാണെന്ന് എഡുവിനു വേണ്ടി സംസാരിക്കവെ അവരുടെ മീഡിയ സഹായിയായ റഷീദ് സുബൈർ വാദിച്ചു. എന്നിരുന്നാലും ഈ അഭ്യർത്ഥന, ഗവൺമെന്‍റ് ബിസിനസുകളിലെ വഞ്ചനയും മറ്റ് തരത്തിലുള്ള അഴിമതിയും വ്യക്തമായി നിരോധിച്ചിരിക്കുന്ന, നൈജീരിയയുടെ 2009-ലെ സാമ്പത്തിക നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങളുടെ വിവിധ വകുപ്പുകൾക്ക് വിരുദ്ധമാണെന്ന കാര്യം ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ടത് നിർണ്ണായകമാണ്. കൂടാതെ, നൈജീരിയയുടെ 2009-ലെ സാമ്പത്തിക നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങളുടെ അധ്യായം ഏഴ്, വകുപ്പ് 713 വ്യക്തമായി പ്രസ്താവിക്കുന്ന പ്രകാരം "സ്വകാര്യ പണം ഒരു സാഹചര്യത്തിലും ഗവൺമെന്‍റിന്‍റെ ബാങ്ക് അക്കൗണ്ടിലേക്കും പൊതു പണം സ്വകാര്യ അക്കൗണ്ടിലേക്കും അടയ്ക്കരുത്." അത് ഇങ്ങനെയും വ്യവസ്ഥ ചെയ്തിരിക്കുന്നു, "പൊതു പണം സ്വകാര്യ അക്കൗണ്ടിലേക്ക് അടയ്ക്കുന്ന ഏതൊരു ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥനും തട്ടിപ്പ് ലക്ഷ്യമിട്ടാണ് അങ്ങനെ ചെയ്തതെന്ന് കണക്കാക്കും."

Knight of the Galactic Railroad by Kenji Miyazawa. This is a Japanese story of two young boys who embark on a mystical journey on a celestial train, going through the galaxy, encountering various allegorical experiences and deep philosophical themes. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. The novel was adapted into a manga in 1983 and an anime in 1985.	id_ID	Knight of the Galactic Railroad karya Kenji Miyazawa. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	pt_PT	O Túmulo do Soldado Desconhecido é um monumento dedicado aos militares que deram tudo pela defesa da pátria. Localizado no Cemitério Nacional de Arlington, no estado da Virgínia, e visitado por milhões de pessoas todos os anos, o Túmulo do Soldado Desconhecido está orgulhosamente protegido por sentinelas. Os soldados do Terceiro Regime de Infantaria dos EUA, a Velha Guarda, ficaram responsáveis por vigiar o Túmulo em abril de 1948 e continuam a respeitar o seu dever sagrado. O Túmulo do Soldado Desconhecido foi vigiado 24 horas por dia, 7 dias por semana, 365 dias por ano, durante os últimos 77 anos.

Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	sv_SE	Siso arbetar över flera ämnesområden och har skapat en rik serie landskapmålningar, porträtt och stilleben i både akryl, pastell, blyerts och vattenfärg. Med inspiration från familjeporträtt, egna fotografier och minnen visar Siso upp hela paletten av intressen och färdigheter med färgrika kompositioner i olika medier. Sisos tropiska landskaps- och havsmålningar är en reflektion över geografiska områden i hans förflutna och karaktäriseras av rika mönster och människor för meningsfulla kopplingar mellan kultur, minnen och miljön. Siso ger sina verk titlar med en blandning av spanska och engelska för att rikta blickarna mot det hyllade men komplicerade livet i Los Angeles. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" öppnar lördag 13 januari med mottagning kl. 18.00–20.00. Utställningen pågår fram till söndag 3 mars.

The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	nl_NL	Oekraïne heeft in 2019 een wet aangenomen die het gebruik van de Oekraïense taal verplicht binnen alle gebieden van het openbare leven, inclusief de overheid, geneeskunde, wetenschap, onderwijs en media. And I just continued that process until I had as many layers as I liked, and it looked really antiqued in like an actual metal ornament. After that, I did go in with a little bit more of that burnished amber spray paint as well, and just applied that to the surface, to kind of give it that oxidized look like we did for the bell ornaments. It's also easier than ever to spread misinformation, and fake news has become a real issue in recent times. We see this with students. According to a Stanford study, only 25% of high school students were able to identify an accurate news story compared to a fake one. Students also had a hard time distinguishing between real and fake photographs, as well as authentic and staged videos.	nl_NL	Met digitale tools is het nog nooit zo eenvoudig geweest om je werk te creëren, te bewerken en voor de hele wereld te publiceren. Affordable furniture DIYs are always a hit here on Lone Fox, so I wanted to share with you guys how I created this nightstand from a simple crate from IKEA. So this is the Knagglig crate, which you can pick up for about $10 at IKEA. And I went ahead and I started off by just constructing it based off the instructions. You have to just screw all of the elements together. And once they are all screwed up, you have a basic wooden crate. Now on the bottom of the wooden crate, I wanted to add a leg, so I elevated it off the floor with these little wooden trinket dishes, or like little wooden trays that I found at the craft store as well. They are just a simple wood, very similar to the one from IKEA, and I just E6000ed these down. You could also use a nail gun if you'd like to. And once you are done, you have a very simple, minimal nightstand.	ko_KR	여기 Lone Fox에서 저렴한 가격의 가구 DIY는 항상 인기가 많습니다. 그래서 저는 IKEA의 단순한 상자로 이 침실용 탁자를 어떻게 만들었는지 여러분과 공유하고 싶었습니다. 이 상자는 IKEA에서 10달러 정도에 구입할 수 있는 크나글리그 상자입니다. 먼저 설명서에 따라 이 상자를 조립하였습니다. 모든 부품들을 함께 고정하기만 하면 됩니다. 모두 조립하면 기본적인 나무 상자가 됩니다. 이제 이 나무 상자 아래에 다리를 추가하고 싶었습니다. 그래서 이러한 작은 나무 장신구 접시나 공예품 가게에서 발견한 작은 나무 쟁반 등을 이용해서 바닥에서 들어 올렸습니다. 이들은 IKEA의 제품과 매우 유사한 단순한 목재입니다. 저는 이걸 E6000 접착제로 붙였는데, 네일건을 사용해도 됩니다. 작업이 끝나면 가장 단순한 침실용 탁자가 만들어집니다.

In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	zu_ZA	Ngo-2019, i-Ukraine yabeka umthetho owenza ukuba ukusetshenziswa kolimi lwase-Ukraine kube impoqo kuzo zonke izindawo zasemphakathini, kuhlanganise uhulumeni, imithi, isayensi, ezemfundo, kanye nabezindaba. The consultation ends this Monday and proposes rents be set by the lowest of three comparators: open market rent; a landlord's proposed new rent; and a "reasonable" increase devised from a new taper system using comparison with a percentage of market rent.	fr_CA	La Cost of Living Act arrivant à échéance le 31 mars 2024, un nouveau document de consultation vise à prolonger les contrôles sur les augmentations de loyers pouvant être appliquées au cours de l'année à venir. La consultation, qui se termine ce lundi, propose que l'établissement des loyers repose sur le plus bas des trois comparateurs suivants : le loyer du marché libre, un nouveau loyer proposé par un propriétaire ou une augmentation « raisonnable » calculée à partir d'un nouveau système dégressif basé sur un pourcentage du loyer en vigueur sur le marché.

Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	ur_PK	FAA ایک اور جس مفید وسیلے سے لنک کرتا ہے وہ Boeing ورلڈ وائیڈ سٹیٹسٹیکل سمری آف کمرشل جیٹ ایئر پلین ایکسیڈنٹس 1959-2022 ہے، جو حادثوں کو جہاز کے ماڈل کی بنیاد پر تقسیم کر کے جہاز کی قسم کی سلامتی کا تخمینہ لگاتی ہے۔ رپورٹ کے مطابق، جو ستمبر 2023 میں شائع کی گئی تھی، Boeing 787 اور Airbus A350 ایسے جہازی ماڈلز ہیں جن میں ہل کے نقصانات کی تعداد سب سے کم ہوتی ہے؛ یہ ایسا حادثہ ہوتا ہے جس میں تباہ شدہ جہاز کی مرمت نہیں کی جا سکتی۔ رپورٹ میں کچھ مزید ماڈلز کا بتایا گیا ہے جن میں کبھی ہل کا نقصان نہیں ہوا، جن میں شامل ہے ڈبل ڈیکر دیو قامت Airbus A380۔ لیکن ان ماڈلز نے رپورٹ کے وقت 1 ملین سے کم روانگیاں کی تھیں۔

The Department of Justice's overall approach to corporate crimes has come under intense scrutiny from advocates. While watchdogs have lauded some steps the department has taken during Merrick Garland's tenure as attorney general - like finally establishing a database on corporate crime - Biden's DOJ has also leaned heavily on leniency agreements that allow companies to defer or avoid prosecution, and encouraged companies to scapegoat individual employees so as to avoid a broader charge. Kenneth Polite Jr., former assistant attorney general for DOJ's Criminal Division, revised the division's corporate enforcement policy so as to limit prosecutions.	ro_RO	Abordarea generală a Departamentului de Justiție față de infracțiunile corporative a atras mare atenție din partea activiștilor. Now let's continue. We've all done something self-destructive at some point in our lives. Most of the time, it's not intentional and doesn't become a habit. Self-destructive behaviors are those that are bound to harm you physically or mentally. It may be unintentional, or you may know exactly what you're doing, but the urge is too strong to control. Problems can eventually arise when this type of behavior becomes habitual. So, here are seven common behaviors of a self-destructive person.	pt_BR	Olá, Psych2Goers, e bem-vindos de volta ao nosso canal. Agradecemos muito todo o amor que vocês têm nos dedicado. Na maioria das vezes, isso não é intencional e não se torna um hábito. Comportamentos autodestrutivos são aqueles que causam danos físicos ou mentais. Eles podem não ser intencionais, ou talvez você saiba exatamente o que está fazendo, mas é uma vontade muito forte, incontrolável. In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	fil_PH	In-adopt ng Ukraine ang isang batas na umoobliga sa paggamit ng wikang Ukranian sa lahat ng antas ng pamumuhay, kasama na ang gobyerno, medisina, syensya, edukasyon at ang media noong 2019. Ang hindi pagsunod ay maaaring magbunga ng multa. Simula noong 2022, noong magumpisa ang gulo sa Russia, sumailalim ang Ukraine sa isang kampanya laban sa Russia. The king, Lalibela, is said to have traveled the 1,600 miles to Jerusalem. Legend has it, when he returned and Jerusalem fell to the Islamic conquest, Lalibela ordered a new home for Christianity. Each church was carved from a single piece of rock to symbolize spirituality and humility. The Christian faith inspired many features receiving Biblical names. Even Lalibela's river is known as the River Jordan. Lalibela remained the capital of Ethiopia from the late-12th into the 13th century.	ro_RO	Se spune că regele, Lalibela, a călătorit 1.600 de mile până la Ierusalim. Fiecare biserică a fost sculptată din câte un singur bloc de stâncă, pentru a simboliza spiritualitatea și smerenia. Credința creștină a inspirat multe trăsături care au primit nume biblice. Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	hu_HU	A különböző témákat mesterien feldolgozva Siso számos alkotást készített: tájképeket, portrékat és csendéleteket, akril-, pasztell-, ceruza- vagy vízfesték-technikával. A családi portrékról, saját fényképeiről és az emlékezetből készített rajzok olyan színpompás kompozíciók, melyek kiterjedt érdeklődési körét és a különböző elsajátított technikákban szerzett készségeit bizonyítják. Siso trópusi tájképei és tengerábrázolásai múltjának helyszíneit tükrözik, gazdag mintázatukkal és az emberalakokkal pedig mélyebb értelemben kapcsolják össze a kultúrát, az emlékeket és a környezetet. Siso műveinek kevert nyelven, spanyolul és angolul ad címet, ezzel is kifejezve, hogy az életének Los Angeles megyében mennyire fontos és szerves része a komplexitás. A „Vicente Siso: Emlékek a szárazföldről és a vízről” című kiállítás megnyitója január 13-án, szombaton lesz, 18:00-tól 20:00-ig tartó fogadással. A kiállítás március 3-ig, vasárnapig tekinthető meg.

The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	no_NO	Den ukjente soldats grav er et monument dedikert til soldater som ga alt i å forsvare landet vårt. Soldatene i tredje United States Infantry Regiment, Old Guard, tok over retten til å vokte over gravsteinen i april i 1948, og er fortsatt ansvarlig for denne hedersfylte oppgaven. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier har vært bevoktet 24 timer i døgnet, 7 dager i uken, 365 dager i året de siste 77 årene.

So I went in with ginger first. I applied a droplet onto our ornament and just blended it out like so. And I just continued that process until I had as many layers as I liked, and it looked really antiqued in like an actual metal ornament. After that, I did go in with a little bit more of that burnished amber spray paint as well, and just applied that to the surface, to kind of give it that oxidized look like we did for the bell ornaments. And that is how I finished off these antique brass bobbles. Really simple and easy, but honestly, they look like real metal and they're beautiful.	fr_FR	Pour créer la décoration en laiton antique, j'ai juste appliqué une couche de Rub & Buff sur toute la décoration. In Germany, where workers and bosses run many companies jointly, a big strike is unusual. A wave of big strikes is almost unheard of. Right now the country of "co-determination" is simultaneously facing an eight-day "action week" by irate farmers, who blocked roads with tractors, a three-day strike of railway workers and, to top it off, a looming strike of doctors, who already closed surgeries between Christmas and New Year's Day. This Mistgabelmop (pitchfork mob), as some have taken to calling it, will test Germany's harmonious labour relations in the year to come.	ro_RO	În Germania, unde lucrătorii și antreprenorii conduc multe companii împreună, o grevă de amploare este ceva neobișnuit. Un val de greve semnificative este aproape inimaginabil. În acest moment, țara „codeterminării” se confruntă simultan cu o „săptămână de măsuri” ale agricultorilor furioși care au blocat drumurile cu tractoarele, ajunsă deja în a opta zi, cu o grevă de trei zile a lucrătorilor feroviari și, una peste alta, amenințarea cu greva a medicilor care și-au închis deja cabinetele în perioada dintre Crăciun și Anul Nou. Această „mistgabelmop” (mulțimea cu furcile), cum au ajuns unii să o denumească, va pune la încercare relațiile de muncă armonioase din Germania în anul care vine.

Knight of the Galactic Railroad by Kenji Miyazawa. This is a Japanese story of two young boys who embark on a mystical journey on a celestial train, going through the galaxy, encountering various allegorical experiences and deep philosophical themes. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. This tapering proposal would set rent increases between 6 per cent and a maximum of 15 per cent which, ironically, would be higher than historic annual price rises. But, more importantly, this scheme would be unwieldy, overly complex and prohibitively expensive to monitor and implement. We already have a system involving the first-tier housing tribunal which rules on whether a rent increase is fair. This seems like adding further layers of bureaucracy with no gain for landlords or tenants.	de_DE	Die vorgeschlagene Staffelung würde Mietpreissteigerungen zwischen 6 % und maximal 15 % vorsehen, die damit ironischerweise höher ausfallen würden als die durchschnittlichen jährlichen Steigerungen in der Vergangenheit. Vor allem wäre diese Regelung jedoch umständlich, übermäßig komplex und ihre Überwachung und Umsetzung unbezahlbar. Es besteht bereits ein Schutzmechanismus, indem die erste Instanz des Wohnungsgerichts über die Angemessenheit einer Mieterhöhung entscheidet. Es läuft also darauf hinaus, dass zusätzliche bürokratische Hürden aufgebaut werden, die weder Vermietern noch Mietern nutzen.

Thomas Puls of IW Köln fears that the strikes will harm the image of Germany as a place for business. Local bosses are already fretting about a German version of the gilets jaunes protests in France in 2018, which culminated in yellow-jacketed demonstrators torching cars on the Champs-Elysées and the police stepping in with tear gas. Jochen Kopelke, head of Germany's police union, warned in an interview with Tagesspiegel, a daily, that the farmers were probably "just the start of an enormous wave of protest this year." Germany was the only big economy to shrink in 2023, and the year ended on an especially sour note, with an unexpected drop in business confidence in December. This year is shaping up to be even tougher.	sk_SK	Thomas Puls z think-tanku IW Köln sa obáva, že tieto štrajky poškodia imidž Nemecka ako miesta pre podnikanie. Miestni šéfovia sa už hrozia nemeckej verzie protestov gilets jaunes, ktoré prebehli v roku 2018 vo Francúzsku a viedli až k tomu, že demonštranti v žltých vestách podpaľovali autá na Champs-Elysées a polícia proti nim musela zakročiť so slzným plynom. Predseda nemeckého policajného zväzu Jochen Kopelke v rozhovore pre denník Tagesspiegel upozornil na to, že títo poľnohospodári sú pravdepodobne „iba predzvesťou obrovskej vlny protestov, ktoré ešte tento rok uvidíme“. Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	ro_RO	O altă resursă la care face trimitere FAA este Rezumatul statistic mondial al Boeing privind accidentele cu avioane comerciale din perioada 1959 și 2022, care evaluează siguranța tipului de avion printr-o defalcare a accidentelor pe baza modelului de avion. Potrivit raportului, care a fost publicat în septembrie 2023, Boeing 787 și Airbus A350 sunt modelele de aeronave cu cele mai puține pierderi capitale totale, adică un accident în care aeronava este distrusă de așa manieră încât nu mai permite repararea. Există și alte câteva modele în raport care nu au experimentat niciodată o pierdere capitală, inclusiv colosul cu două etaje Airbus A380. Hey Psych2Goers, and welcome back to our channel. Thank you so much for all the love you've given us. Your ongoing support has helped us make psychology and mental health more accessible to everyone. Now let's continue. We've all done something self-destructive at some point in our lives. Most of the time, it's not intentional and doesn't become a habit. Self-destructive behaviors are those that are bound to harm you physically or mentally. It may be unintentional, or you may know exactly what you're doing, but the urge is too strong to control. Problems can eventually arise when this type of behavior becomes habitual. Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	et_EE	Teine kasulik ressurss, millele FAA viitab, on Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, mis hindab lennukitüübi ohutust, näidates toimunud õnnetusi lennukimudeli kaupa. Vastavalt 2023. aasta septembris avaldatud aruandele on Boeing 787 ja Airbus A350 lennukimudelitega juhtunud kõige vähem täielikke kerekaotamisi, s.t õnnetusi, milles lennuk hävib nii, et seda pole enam võimalik remontida. Right now the country of "co-determination" is simultaneously facing an eight-day "action week" by irate farmers, who blocked roads with tractors, a three-day strike of railway workers and, to top it off, a looming strike of doctors, who already closed surgeries between Christmas and New Year's Day. Knight of the Galactic Railroad by Kenji Miyazawa. This is a Japanese story of two young boys who embark on a mystical journey on a celestial train, going through the galaxy, encountering various allegorical experiences and deep philosophical themes. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. The novel was adapted into a manga in 1983 and an anime in 1985.	sk_SK	Noc na galaktickej železnici od Kendžiho Mijazawu. The Airbus A310, which was introduced in 1983, has the highest rate of hull losses - 2.53 per 1 million departures - among the models that are still in service as passenger aircraft. This is a Japanese story of two young boys who embark on a mystical journey on a celestial train, going through the galaxy, encountering various allegorical experiences and deep philosophical themes. As they navigate the night sky, the story reflects on life, death, and the human condition, leaving readers with a profound exploration of existence and the universe. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	id_ID	Referensi berguna lainnya yang dirujuk oleh FAA adalah Ringkasan Statistik Kecelakaan Pesawat Jet Komersial 1959-2022, yang menilai keselamatan jenis pesawat dengan memerinci kecelakaan berdasarkan model pesawat. Menurut laporan tersebut, yang diterbitkan pada September 2023, Boeing 787 dan Airbus A350 adalah model pesawat dengan paling sedikit hull loss, istilah untuk kecelakaan yang membuat pesawat rusak dan tidak dapat diperbaiki. Ada beberapa model lain dalam laporan ini yang tidak pernah mengalami kerusakan parah, termasuk raksasa dek ganda Airbus A380. Namun, model-model tersebut baru mencatatkan jumlah keberangkatan kurang dari 1 juta pada saat laporan dibuat.

Local bosses are already fretting about a German version of the gilets jaunes protests in France in 2018, which culminated in yellow-jacketed demonstrators torching cars on the Champs-Elysées and the police stepping in with tear gas. The airplane model is typically noted in the booking information for a flight. On Google Flights, it's included in the flight details when a listing is expanded, and it's usually listed on individual airlines" reservation pages. If, for some reason, the plane type isn't apparent on Google Flights or the reservation page, sites like Expert Flyer and Seat Guru aggregate flight information like seat maps and aircraft type.	da_DK	Typisk fremgår flymodellen af bookingoplysningerne for en flyrejse. The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	th_TH	ปัญหาที่เกิดกับ EPA นั้นแตกต่างออกไป แต่ไม่ได้ไม่เกี่ยวข้องกับปัญหาที่เกิดกับกระทรวงยุติธรรมซึ่งจัดการอาชญากรรมด้านสิ่งแวดล้อมผ่านฝ่ายดูแลสิ่งแวดล้อมและทรัพยากรธรรมชาติหรือ ENRD ก่อนที่ Uhlmann ซึ่งเป็นผู้ช่วยเลขานุการของ EPA ด้านการบังคับใช้กฎหมาย จะมาร่วมงานกับ EPA นั้น เขาเคยดำรงตำแหน่งหัวหน้าแผนกอาชญากรรมด้านสิ่งแวดล้อมมานานตั้งแต่ปี 1990 ถึง 2007 EPA เลื่อนคดีแพ่งและคดีอาญาที่ร้ายแรงที่สุดไปยัง ENRD ซึ่งด้วยความที่เป็นสำนักงานที่มีงบน้อย จึงมักจะต้องพึ่งพาหน่วยงานอื่นในการช่วยเลือกว่าจะต่อสู้ในเรื่องใด ในปีงบประมาณ 2022 EPA เลื่อนคดีไปยัง DOJ (88) น้อยกว่าที่เคยทำมาตั้งแต่ปี 2000 และสรุปคดีตุลาการแพ่งน้อยกว่าที่เคยทำมาตั้งแต่ปีดังกล่าวด้วยเช่นกัน เมื่อพิจารณาจากข้อมูลที่โครงการความสมบูรณ์ด้านสิ่งแวดล้อมตั้งข้อสังเกต แม้แต่ EPA ของทรัมป์ก็สรุปคดีแพ่ง 94 คดีและเลื่อนคดีไปยัง DOJ จำนวน 106 คดีต่อปีโดยเฉลี่ย

Nearby, Basil was awoken by an emergency alert as a foul smelling gas cloud from the blaze was spread across the area. Locals were told not to leave their homes and to close all windows and doors, although this alert was lifted around 7 AM when the smoke was thought to be non-fatal. It wouldn't be the air so much as the water that would be heavily polluted, and it would be the very water used to douse the flames that would cause the disaster. The highly toxic mercury compounds were present as fungicides in sea dressings in the warehouse, and were marked with fluorescent red dye Rhodamine B.	es_MX	Cerca de allí, una alerta de emergencia despertó a Basil mientras una nube de gas fétido de las llamas se extendía por toda la zona. The king, Lalibela, is said to have traveled the 1,600 miles to Jerusalem. Legend has it, when he returned and Jerusalem fell to the Islamic conquest, Lalibela ordered a new home for Christianity. Unfortunately, this consultation paper seems like a further attempt to impose controls on the sector. A far simpler solution would be to let the market return to normal, not impose external controls on rent levels, and the result will be lower rent increases than we have seen in the last 18 months. To stabilise rental prices in the long term then the government must encourage greater investment and growth in the private rented sector (PRS) while simultaneously funding a substantial growth in the supply of social housing. The greater the investment in the PRS the more stability will be created in the housing market. Increasing volumes in both the PRS and social housing markets will stabilise rents over time as demand meets supply and equilibrium is achieved. Only by adopting these measures will we start to address the current housing crisis. Anything else is simply not going to work.	es_MX	Desafortunadamente, esta consulta parece ser un nuevo intento de imponer controles al sector. Una solución mucho más simple sería devolver al mercado a su normalidad y no imponer controles externos sobre los niveles de los alquileres, lo que resultaría en aumentos más moderados de los que vimos en los últimos 18 meses. Para estabilizar el precio de los alquileres a largo plazo, el gobierno debería fomentar una mayor inversión y crecimiento en el sector privado del alquiler (PRS, por sus siglas en inglés), mientras que al mismo tiempo se financia un crecimiento substancial de la vivienda social. A mayor inversión en el PRS, más estabilidad se producirá en el sector de la vivienda. Incrementar los volúmenes tanto en el PRS como en los mercados de vivienda social logrará la estabilidad a lo largo del tiempo, dado que la demanda coincidirá con la oferta y se alcanzará un equilibrio. What is there to excavate if Cosa is originally a Roman site? Was the Pantheon in Rome excavated? No, the Pantheon is even at the same ground level as the surrounding, contemporary buildings. And why is that? Because the Pantheon was probably built during the Roman era. It is also almost cardinally oriented, which indicates that it cannot be very ancient.	fr_FR	Bienvenue à Cosa, en Italie. Cosa serait une ancienne colonie romaine. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	te_IN	అజ్ఞాత సైనికుల సమాధి అనేది మన దేశాన్ని రక్షించడంలో తమ ప్రాణాలను అర్పించిన సైనికులకు అంకితం చేసిన ఒక స్మారక స్థలం. వర్జీనియాలోని ఆర్లింగ్టన్ జాతీయ సిమెటరీలో ఉన్న సమాధి ప్రతి సంవత్సరం మిలియన్ల సందర్శకులను ఆకర్షిస్తోంది. ఈ అజ్ఞాత సైనికుల సమాధి, టూమ్ సెంటిన‌ల్స్ అనే యూఎస్ రెజిమెంట్ సైనికుల రక్షణలో గర్వంగా నిలబడింది. 1948 ఏప్రిల్‌లో 3వ యునైటెడ్ స్టేట్స్ ఇన్‌ఫ్యాంట్రీ రెజిమెంట్, ది ఓల్డ్ గార్డ్ సైనికులు ఈ సమాధిని రక్షించే హక్కును స్వీకరించి, ఈ పవిత్ర బాధ్యతను కొనసాగిస్తున్నారు. అజ్ఞాత సైనికుల సమాధి గత 77 సంవత్సరాలుగా రోజుకు 24 గంటలు, వారానికి 7 రోజులు, సంవత్సరానికి 365 రోజుల చొప్పున రక్షించబడుతోంది.

Over the past decade, our lives have changed through technology, with many working from home, and Sydney has gained an impressive network of metro and light rail systems. Our ability to purchase online has changed the way we shop, and friends and family seem closer because of smartphone communication. Scientists at the John Innes Centre may have found out. Land plants survive by getting water and nutrients from the soil. They do this by forming a special friendship with soil-dwelling fungi called mycorrhiza. These strands of mycorrhiza reach deep into the soil and drag the nutrients and water back to the plants. But when the first algae landed on soil, how did they survive long enough to form these beneficial friendships?	pa_IN	ਤਕਰੀਬਨ 450 ਮਿਲੀਅਨ ਸਾਲ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ, ਪੌਦਿਆਂ ਨੇ ਇੱਕ ਬਹੁਤ ਹੀ ਸਾਹਸੀ ਕਦਮ ਚੁੱਕਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਮਹਾਸਾਗਰਾਂ ਵਿੱਚੋਂ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ 'ਤੇ ਆ ਕੇ ਉਹ ਪੌਦੇ ਬਣ ਗਏ ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਬਾਰੇ ਅੱਜ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਹੈ ਅਤੇ ਅਸੀਂ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਬੇਹੱਦ ਪਸੰਦ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਾਂ। ਪਰ ਉਹ ਜੀਵਤ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਰਹੇ? ਜੌਨ ਇਨੇਸ ਸੈਂਟਰ ਦੇ ਵਿਗਿਆਨਿਕਾਂ ਨੇ ਸ਼ਾਇਦ ਪਤਾ ਲਗਾ ਲਿਆ ਹੈ। ਜ਼ਮੀਨੀ ਪੌਦੇ ਮਿੱਟੀ ਤੋਂ ਪਾਣੀ ਅਤੇ ਪੋਸ਼ਕ ਤੱਤ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਜੀਵਤ ਰਹਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ। ਉਹ ਮਿੱਟੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਰਹਿਣ ਵਾਲੀ ਮਾਈਕੋਰਹੀਜ਼ਾ ਨਾਮਕ ਫਫੂੰਦ ਨਾਲ ਇੱਕ ਖਾਸ ਸਾਂਝ ਬਣਾ ਕੇ ਇੰਝ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ। ਮਾਈਕੋਰਹੀਜ਼ਾ ਦੇ ਇਹ ਤਣੇ ਮਿੱਟੀ ਦੀ ਡੂੰਘਾਈ ਵਿੱਚ ਪਹੁੰਚ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ ਅਤੇ ਪੋਸ਼ਕ-ਤੱਤ ਅਤੇ ਪਾਣੀ ਖਿੱਚ ਕੇ ਪੌਦਿਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਵਾਪਸ ਪਹੁੰਚਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ। ਪਰ ਜਦੋਂ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਕਾਈ ਮਿੱਟੀ 'ਤੇ ਆ, ਤਾਂ ਉਹ ਏਨਾਂ ਲੰਮਾ ਚਿਰ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਜੀਵਤ ਰਹੇ ਕਿ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੇ ਫਾਇਦੇਮੰਦ ਦੋਸਤੀਆਂ ਬਣਾ ਲਈਆਂ?

Reversing the trend of jail deaths, and solving the many other issues facing our jails, may require some difficult policy decisions. However, independent oversight of jails is a critical first step toward a safer and more humane jail system. With the Cost of Living Act legislation ending on 31 March 2024, a new consultation document seeks to extend controls on the level of rent increases that can be levied in the coming year. The consultation ends this Monday and proposes rents be set by the lowest of three comparators: open market rent; a landlord's proposed new rent; and a "reasonable" increase devised from a new taper system using comparison with a percentage of market rent.	pt_BR	Com o fim da legislação, em 31 de março de 2024, um novo documento de consulta visa estender o controle do aumento no preço do aluguel que poderá ser cobrado no próximo ano. A consulta termina na próxima segunda-feira, e propõem que os alugueis sejam definidos pelo mais baixo de três comparadores: o valor do aluguel no mercado, o novo valor de um aluguel proposto pelo proprietário e um aumento "razoável" derivado de um novo sistema de preços que compara uma porcentagem do aluguel de mercado.

Speaking on behalf of Edu, Rasheed Zubair, her media aide, asserts that the act is legal within the framework of the Nigerian civil service. However, it is crucial to note that the request violates various sections of Nigeria's Financial Regulations 2009, which explicitly prohibit fraud and other forms of corruption in government business. Additionally, Chapter Seven, Section 713 of Nigeria's Financial Regulations 2009 explicitly states, "Personal money shall in no circumstances be paid into a government bank account, nor shall any public money be paid into a private account." It further stipulates, "Any officer who pays public money into a private account is deemed to have done so with fraudulent intention."	ru_RU	Говоря от лица Эду, Рашид Зубаир, ее медиаконсультант, уточняет, что действие является законным в рамках государственной службы Нигерии. Однако, необходимо отметить, что данный запрос нарушает сразу несколько статей Финансового регламента Нигерии от 2009 года, в которых напрямую запрещается мошенничество и другие формы коррупции в государственных заказах. Кроме того, в разделе 713 седьмой главы Финансового регламента Нигерии от 2009 года прямо указано, что "личные средства ни при каких обстоятельствах не разрешается переводить на государственный банковский счет, а государственные средства – на личный счет". Далее говорится, что "любое должностное лицо, переводящее государственные средства на частный банковский счет, считается делающим это с целью мошенничества".

Hook the vacuum up to it, it helps keep the dust down, and you can prep your concrete that way also. We prefer to do it with the hand grinders ourself, so either way will work pretty good. Usually if it's got an epoxy coating already, the hand grinders work a little better, but this thing works really good too. So after we do that, we fix all the cracks, fix all the divots with our patch repair material, and then we grind them smooth. And then we clean the concrete and get it ready for the first coating. This is going to be a 100% solids epoxy, so it goes on in its different procedures, different stages.	ro_RO	Conectați aspiratorul la ea, ajută să nu se ridice praful, și puteți pregăti tot așa și betonul. De obicei, dacă are deja un strat epoxidic, șlefuitoarele manuale funcționează puțin mai bine, dar și chestia asta merge foarte bine. The report also includes a comparison of hull loss accident rates per million departures, which helps account for the fact that some of the models are more common or have been around longer than others. The Airbus A310, which was introduced in 1983, has the highest rate of hull losses - 2.53 per 1 million departures - among the models that are still in service as passenger aircraft. The Airbus 320 family, which includes the A321 and A319neo, has the lowest rate, at 0.11. The Boeing 737 MAX line, which has been around since 2017, has a rate of 1.48.	pl_PL	W zestawieniu znajduje się także porównanie wskaźników wypadków z utratą kadłuba w przeliczeniu na milion odlotów, co jest pomocne w zrozumieniu, że określone modele występują częściej lub funkcjonują dłużej od innych. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. In general I really like the interplay between the two games. The advantage of shortform stories is that you can "skip to the good part", they can be more immediately engrossing and satisfying. The advantage of longform stories is that you can imbue whatever happens with way more emotional weight, you lose the immediacy in exchange for stronger payoffs.	zh_TW	整體而言，我真的喜歡這兩部遊戲之間的相互影響。短篇故事的優勢是，你可以「略過好的部分」，可能會更為立即使人著迷和感到滿意。長篇故事的優勢則是你可以讓所發生的任何情況充滿更重的情感，你犧牲了即時性來換取更強烈的回報。

Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	kn_IN	ವಿಷಯದ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಪಾಂಡಿತ್ಯಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡುವ ಸಿಸೋ ಅವರು ಅಕ್ರಿಲಿಕ್, ಪಾಸ್ಟೆಲ್, ಪೆನ್ಸಿಲ್ ಅಥವಾ ವಾಟರ್ ಕಲರ್‌ನಲ್ಲಿ ಲ್ಯಾಂಡ್‌ಸ್ಕೇಪ್‌ಗಳು, ಪೋರ್ಟ್ರೇಟ್‌ಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಜೀವ ಸದೃಶ ಕೃತಿಗಳ ಸಮೃದ್ಧ ಸರಣಿಯನ್ನು ರಚಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಕುಟುಂಬದ ಪೋರ್ಟ್ರೇಟ್‌ಗಳು, ಸ್ವಂತ ರೆಫರೆನ್ಸ್‌ನ ಛಾಯಚಿತ್ರಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಸ್ವಂತ ಸ್ಮರಣೆಯಿಂದ ಅವರು ಚಿತ್ರಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ. ಅವರ ವರ್ಣರಂಚಿತ ಸಂಯೋಜನೆಗಳು ವಿವಿಧ ಮಾಧ್ಯಮಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಅವರು ಹೊಂದಿರುವ ಆಸಕ್ತಿಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಕೌಶಲ್ಯಗಳನ್ನು ಪ್ರದರ್ಶಿಸುತ್ತವೆ. ಸಿಸೋ ಅವರ ಉಷ್ಣ ವಲಯದ ಲ್ಯಾಂಡ್‌ಸ್ಕೇಪ್‌ಗಳು ಅವರ ಹಿಂದಿನ ಭೌಗೋಳಿಕತೆಯನ್ನು ಪ್ರತಿಬಿಂಬಿಸುತ್ತವೆ ಮತ್ತು ಶ್ರೀಮಂತ ಮಾದರಿಗಳನ್ನು ಬಳಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತವೆ ಮತ್ತು ಸಂಸ್ಕೃತಿ, ಸ್ಮರಣೆ ಮತ್ತು ಪರಿಸರದ ನಡುವೆ ಅರ್ಥಪೂರ್ಣ ಸಂಬಂಧಗಳನ್ನು ಬೆಳೆಸಲು ಜನರನ್ನು ಸೇರಿಸಿಕೊಳ್ಳುತ್ತವೆ. ಸಿಸೋ ತಮ್ಮ ಕಲಾಕೃತಿಗಳಿಗೆ ಸ್ಪ್ಯಾನಿಷ್ ಮತ್ತು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್‌ ಮಿಶ್ರಿತ ಭಾಷೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಶೀರ್ಷಿಕೆ ನೀಡುತ್ತಾರೆ. ಇದು ಲಾಸ್‌ ಏಂಜಲೀಸ್‌ ಕೌಂಟಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಅವರ ಜೀವನದ ಸಂಭ್ರಮದ ಮತ್ತು ಅವಿಭಾಜ್ಯವಾದ ಸಂಕೀರ್ಣತೆಗಳನ್ನು ಸೂಚಿಸುತ್ತದೆ. Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	fr_CA	Maîtrisant une variété de sujets, Siso est à l'origine d'une série prolifique de paysages, de natures mortes et de portraits réalisés à l'acrylique, au pastel, au crayon ou à l'aquarelle. À partir de portraits de famille, de ses propres photos et de ses souvenirs, il a conçu des compositions colorées témoignant de sa palette d'intérêts et de ses compétences dans les diverses techniques. Ses paysages tropicaux et marins sont le reflet des lieux de son passé, avec leurs motifs riches et des personnages qui établissent des liens importants entre la culture, les souvenirs et l'environnement. Siso intitule ses oeuvres en mélangeant l'espagnol et l'anglais, pour célébrer et montrer les grandes complexités de sa vie dans le comté de Los Angeles. L'exposition « Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water » débute le samedi 13 janvier, avec une réception prévue de 18 h à 20 h. Elle durera jusqu'au dimanche 3 mars.

Another useful resource the FAA links to is the Boeing Worldwide Statistical Summary of Commercial Jet Airplane Accidents 1959-2022, which assesses plane-type safety by breaking down accidents based on the aircraft model. According to the report, which was published in September 2023, the Boeing 787 and Airbus A350 are the aircraft models with the fewest total hull losses, an accident in which the aircraft is destroyed beyond repair. There are a few additional models in the report that have never experienced a hull loss, including the double-decker behemoth Airbus A380. But those models had accumulated fewer than 1 million departures at the time of the report.	he_IL	מקור שימושי נוסף, שקישור אליו אפשר למצוא באתר של FAA, הוא סיכום הנתונים הסטטיסטיים של בואינג לגבי תאונות של מטוסי סילון מסחריים בשנים 1959-2022 ברחבי העולם, עם הערכות בטיחות שמבוססות על פירוט תאונות לפי דגמי מטוסים. על פי הדוח, שפורסם בספטמבר 2023, מטוסי בואינג 787 ואיירבס A350 הם דגמי המטוסים עם הכי פחות תאונות שבהן נגרם למטוס נזק שאי אפשר לתקן. בדוח מצוינים כמה דגמים נוספים שמעולם לא קרו להם תאונות כאלו, כולל איירבס A380 הענק בעל שתי הקומות. אולם, הדגמים האלו צברו פחות ממיליון המראות בתקופה שנסקרת בדוח.

To create the antique brass ornament, I just went in with a coat of rub and buff onto the entire ornament there. And then of course, we have to get that antique look with the alcohol ink. So I went in with ginger first. I applied a droplet onto our ornament and just blended it out like so. And I just continued that process until I had as many layers as I liked, and it looked really antiqued in like an actual metal ornament. After that, I did go in with a little bit more of that burnished amber spray paint as well, and just applied that to the surface, to kind of give it that oxidized look like we did for the bell ornaments. And that is how I finished off these antique brass bobbles. Really simple and easy, but honestly, they look like real metal and they're beautiful.	ru_RU	Чтобы создать античное латунное украшение, я нанес один слой металлика Rub 'N Buff на всю поверхность. И так повторил столько слоев, сколько нужно было, пока поверхность не стала выглядеть как настоящий постаревший металл. Потом я добавил немного спрей-краски цвета полированного янтаря. Я нанес ее на поверхность, чтобы придать такой ржавый вид, как мы делали с колокольчиками. Вот так я доделал эти латунные шары, очень просто. To create the antique brass ornament, I just went in with a coat of rub and buff onto the entire ornament there. And then of course, we have to get that antique look with the alcohol ink. So I went in with ginger first. I applied a droplet onto our ornament and just blended it out like so. And I just continued that process until I had as many layers as I liked, and it looked really antiqued in like an actual metal ornament. After that, I did go in with a little bit more of that burnished amber spray paint as well, and just applied that to the surface, to kind of give it that oxidized look like we did for the bell ornaments. And that is how I finished off these antique brass bobbles. Really simple and easy, but honestly, they look like real metal and they're beautiful.	hi_IN	तांबे के एंटीक गहने जैसा लुक देने के लिए मैंने इस पर बस रब एंड बफ़ का एक कोट लगाया. इसके बाद, हमें वह एंटीक लुक पाने के लिए अल्कोहॉल इंक का इस्तेमाल करना है. इसलिए, मैंने पहले अदरक के शेड वाली इंक का इस्तेमाल किया. मैंने इस गहने पर कुछ बूंदें डालीं और उसे बस इस तरह मिला दिया. मैंने ऐसा तब तक किया, जब तक उतनी परतें नहीं चढ़ गईं जितनी चाहिए थीं. इससे यह सचमुच धातु के किसी एंटीक सामान की तरह दिखने लगा है. उसके बाद, मैंने थोड़े चमकदार अंबर कलर का स्प्रे किया और उसे सिर्फ़ सतह पर लगाया, ताकि थोड़ा ऑक्सीडाइज़ जैसा लुक मिले. हमने घंटी वाले सजावट के सामानों के लिए भी ऐसा किया था. इस तरह से हमने पीतल के एंटीक लुक वाले सजावट के इन सामानों को तैयार कर लिया है. यह करना वाकई सरल और आसान है. सच में, ये असली धातु जैसे दिखते हैं और बहुत सुंदर हैं.

In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Masterfully working across subject matter, Siso has generated a prolific series of landscapes, portraits, and still-life works rendered in either acrylic, pastel, pencil or watercolor. Drawing from family portraits, his own reference photographs, and recollection, his colorful compositions demonstrate his range of interests and skill across media. Siso's tropical landscapes and seascapes reflect the geographies of his past, employing rich patterns and incorporating people to make meaningful connections between culture, memory and the environment. Siso titles his artworks in a mix of Spanish and English, signifying the celebrated and integral complexities of his life in Los Angeles County. "Vicente Siso: Memories of the Land and Water" opens on Saturday, Jan. 13, with a reception from 6-8 p.m. The exhibition is on view through Sunday, March 3.	et_EE	Siso kujutab meisterlikult erinevaid teemasid ja ta on loonud arvukalt maale maastikest, portreedest ja vaikelust, mis on maalitud kas akrüülvärvidega, pastellidega, pliiatsiga või vesivärvidega. Affordable furniture DIYs are always a hit here on Lone Fox, so I wanted to share with you guys how I created this nightstand from a simple crate from IKEA. So this is the Knagglig crate, which you can pick up for about $10 at IKEA. And I went ahead and I started off by just constructing it based off the instructions. You have to just screw all of the elements together. And once they are all screwed up, you have a basic wooden crate. Now on the bottom of the wooden crate, I wanted to add a leg, so I elevated it off the floor with these little wooden trinket dishes, or like little wooden trays that I found at the craft store as well. They are just a simple wood, very similar to the one from IKEA, and I just E6000ed these down. You could also use a nail gun if you'd like to. And once you are done, you have a very simple, minimal nightstand.	zh_CN	Lone Fox 频道里，经济实惠的 DIY 家具教程一直很受欢迎，所以我想在这里跟大家分享一下我是怎么用宜家的一个简易板条箱制作这个床头柜的。我用的是 Knagglig 板条箱，宜家售价 10 美元左右。我买回来就开始动手了。首先，我按照说明书把它组装起来。你需要用螺丝把所有零件固定好。全部固定好后，就做成了一个简单的木质板条箱。现在，我想在这个木箱的底部加一个支脚，让它离开地面，所以我找来了一些木质小饰品盘，或者说是那种我在工艺品店里找到的木质小托盘。这些只是些简单的木制品，跟宜家箱子的材质很像，我用 E6000 胶水就把它们粘好了。如果你愿意，也可以用射钉枪。粘好之后，一个简约风格的床头柜就做好了。

Hook the vacuum up to it, it helps keep the dust down, and you can prep your concrete that way also. We prefer to do it with the hand grinders ourself, so either way will work pretty good. Usually if it's got an epoxy coating already, the hand grinders work a little better, but this thing works really good too. So after we do that, we fix all the cracks, fix all the divots with our patch repair material, and then we grind them smooth. And then we clean the concrete and get it ready for the first coating. This is going to be a 100% solids epoxy, so it goes on in its different procedures, different stages.	fr_CA	Raccordez-y l'aspirateur, ça aide à réduire la poussière, et vous pouvez aussi préparer votre ciment de cette façon. Habituellement, s'il y a déjà une couche d'époxy, les meules à main sont un peu plus efficaces, mais cette chose fonctionne très bien aussi. Unfortunately, this consultation paper seems like a further attempt to impose controls on the sector. A far simpler solution would be to let the market return to normal, not impose external controls on rent levels, and the result will be lower rent increases than we have seen in the last 18 months. To stabilise rental prices in the long term then the government must encourage greater investment and growth in the private rented sector (PRS) while simultaneously funding a substantial growth in the supply of social housing. The greater the investment in the PRS the more stability will be created in the housing market. @user22 You can reorder documents like that without JS even. You can’t use hash part of the URL if you want the server to do something though, but you can use query string search params to let the server know which section you want first. You’ve got a choice for reordering the parts:	th_TH	@user22 คุณสามารถเรียงเอกสารในลักษณะนั้นได้แม้ไม่มี JS แต่คุณจะใช้ส่วนแฮชของ URL ไม่ได้ถ้าอยากให้เซิร์ฟเวอร์ทำอะไรสักอย่าง แต่คุณสามารถใช้พารามิเตอร์ค้นหา Query String เพื่อบอกให้เซิร์ฟเวอร์รู้ว่าคุณต้องการให้ส่วนไหนแสดงก่อน คุณสามารถเลือกจัดลำดับส่วนต่างๆ ได้:

What we find now from the latest Scottish Government statistics is that, in the last year alone, average rents have increased in all sized properties, ranging from the lowest rise of 11.7 per cent for one-bedroom to the highest figure of 14.3 per cent for two-bedroom homes. Every type of property (from one to four bedroom to a room in a property) has had a double digit increase in rents since the Cost of Living legislation was introduced in October 2022, exceeding the annual average increases in rents over the previous 12 years by a factor of at least three.	pt_BR	Sendo assim, a lei de 2022 para regulamentação do Custo de Vida (proteção ao inquilino) na Escócia, foi aprovada há quase um ano e meio, com o intuito de estabelecer um teto para os valores cobrados por alugueis residenciais, por um período limitado, a fim de aliviar a pressão da crise no custo de vida do país. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	ja_JP	「無名戦士の墓」は、我が国の防衛に全てを捧げた軍人のための記念碑です。バージニア州のアーリントン国立墓地にあり、毎年何百万人もが訪れる墓石は、歩哨に見守られ堂々と立っています。米国陸軍第3歩兵連隊の衛兵が1948年4月に墓を守る権利を引き継ぎ、その神聖な任務を今も続けています。この墓は、この77年間、365日、週7日、毎日24時間、警護されています。

The problems at the EPA are distinct but not unrelated to those at the Department of Justice, which handles environmental crimes via its Environment and Natural Resources Division, or ENRD. Prior to joining the EPA, Uhlmann - the EPA assistant secretary for enforcement - had served as the longtime head of that division's Environmental Crimes Section, from 1990 through 2007. The EPA sends its most serious civil and criminal cases to ENRD, which - as a relatively underfunded office - often relies on other agencies in helping to choose which fights to take on. In fiscal year 2022, the EPA deferred fewer cases to DOJ (88) than at any point since 2000 and concluded fewer civil judicial cases than it had since that time, as well. As the Environmental Integrity Project notes, even Trump's EPA concluded 94 civil cases and deferred 106 cases per year to the DOJ per year, on average.	sr_RS	Проблеми у агенцији EPA се разликују од оних за Министарство правде које решава еколошка кривична дела преко свог Одељења за животну средину и природне ресурсе (Environment and Natural Resources Division – ENRD), али имају неке везе са њима. Пре придруживања агенцији EPA , Ухлман - помоћник секретара за извршење - дуго је радио као шеф Одсека за еколошка кривична дела у том одељењу, од 1990. до 2007. EPA шаље своја најозбиљнија грађанска и кривична дела у ENRD, која се - као релативно недовољно финансирана канцеларија - често ослања на друге агенције за помоћ при избору у које битке да улази. У фискалној години 2022, EPA је пренела мање предмета Министарству правде (88) него у било ком тренутку од 2000. и такође закључила мање грађанских судских предмета него што је имала од тада. Како напомиње Пројекат еколошког интегритета, чак је и EPA под Трампом закључила 94 грађанских предмета и проследила 106 предмета годишње Министарству правде по години, у просеку.

In 2019, Ukraine adopted a law that makes using the Ukrainian language obligatory in all spheres of public life, including government, medicine, science, education, and the media. Failure to comply can result in fines. Since 2022, when the military conflict with Russia began, Ukraine has undertaken a campaign of total de-Russification, with MPs saying it is necessary in order to defend against Russian influence. Local authorities have introduced complete bans on Russian-language works of art, performances, books, films, songs, and its study in schools and universities, and recommended that schoolchildren communicate in Ukrainian even during breaks.	el_GR	Το 2019 η Ουκρανία υιοθέτησε έναν νόμο που καθιστά υποχρεωτική τη χρήση της ουκρανικής γλώσσας σε όλους τους τομείς της δημόσιας ζωής, όπως στους κρατικούς φορείς, την ιατρική, την επιστήμη, την εκπαίδευση και τα μέσα μαζικής επικοινωνίας. Η μη συμμόρφωση μπορεί να οδηγήσει στην επιβολή προστίμων. Από το 2022, όταν ξεκίνησε η στρατιωτική σύρραξη με τη Ρωσία, η Ουκρανία έχει επιδοθεί σε εκστρατεία πλήρους απορωσοποίησης, με τους βουλευτές να υποστηρίζουν ότι είναι αναγκαίο προκειμένου να προστατευθεί από τη ρώσικη επιρροή. The cold, rainy night ensued my long overdue walk–exploring the city of Paltricus was a privilege to those who’d been safe from the mutation via escape, or pure luck. The city night was beautiful, illuminated with vibrant stars that remained for thousands of years. It must be lonely in the great distant sky. Paltricus was a nice place, but it felt more like a cage than a luxurious place of living. Right now the country of "co-determination" is simultaneously facing an eight-day "action week" by irate farmers, who blocked roads with tractors, a three-day strike of railway workers and, to top it off, a looming strike of doctors, who already closed surgeries between Christmas and New Year's Day. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier is a monument dedicated to servicemen who gave everything in defense of our country. Located in Arlington National Cemetery, Virginia, and attracting millions of visitors each year, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier stands proudly protected by tomb sentinels. The soldiers of the 3rd United States Infantry Regiment, the Old Guard, took over the right to guard the Tomb in April of 1948, and continue to carry on this sacred duty. The Tomb of the Unknown Soldier has been guarded 24 hours a day, seven days a week, 365 days a year, for the past 77 years.	sr_RS	Гробница незнаном јунаку је споменик посвећен војницима који су дали све од себе у одбрани наше земље.
